title: Arcane Engineering
description: A create modpack with a tardis!
body:
# Arcane Engineering

**Description:**
*Arcane Engineering* offers a unique blend of advanced engineering and dimensional exploration, centered around the powerful Create mod and the expansive TARDIS Refined mod. This modpack invites you to dive deep into complex machinery and automation, all while exploring the boundless possibilities of a fully customizable TARDIS base.

### Key Features:

- **Create Mod Mastery:** Delve into the intricate mechanics of the Create mod, where you can design and build elaborate automated systems. From steam-powered factories to intricate contraptions, Create forms the backbone of your engineering feats.

- **TARDIS Refined:** Take your adventure across dimensions with the TARDIS Refined mod. Customize and expand your TARDIS base, making it the ultimate hub for all your explorations and technological advancements.

*Arcane Engineering* is a journey into the heart of innovation and exploration, with Create and TARDIS Refined at its core. Will you master the art of automation and unlock the full potential of your TARDIS? The choice is yours.
